SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository

Interface UserProfileRepository

All Superinterfaces:
CrudRepository<UserProfile,Long>, JpaRepository<UserProfile,Long>, ListCrudRepository<UserProfile,Long>, ListPagingAndSortingRepository<UserProfile,Long>, PagingAndSortingRepository<UserProfile,Long>, QueryByExampleExecutor<UserProfile>, Repository<UserProfile,Long>
public interface UserProfileRepository extends JpaRepository<UserProfile,Long>
Repository interface for UserProfile entity persistence operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    disableUser(UUID externalId)
    Disables a user profile by external identifier.
    int
    enableUser(UUID externalId)
    Enables a user profile by external identifier.
    Optional<UserProfile>
    findByExternalId(UUID externalId)
    Finds a user profile by external identifier.

    findByOauthKey(String oauthKey)
    Finds a user profile by OAuth2 key.

    findUserProfileByDisplayNameContaining(String displayName, Sort sort, Limit limit)
    Searches for user profiles whose display name contains the provided substring.
    int
    setIsManager(UUID externalId, boolean isManager)
    Sets manager privilege for a user profile by external identifier.

  • Method Details

    • findByOauthKey

      Optional<UserProfile> findByOauthKey(String oauthKey)
      Finds a user profile by OAuth2 key.
      Parameters:
      oauthKey - OAuth2 key to search for.
      Returns:
      Optional containing the user profile if found, empty otherwise.

    • findByExternalId

      Optional<UserProfile> findByExternalId(UUID externalId)
      Finds a user profile by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      Returns:
      optional containing the user profile if found.

    • findUserProfileByDisplayNameContaining

      List<UserProfile> findUserProfileByDisplayNameContaining(String displayName, Sort sort, Limit limit)
      Searches for user profiles whose display name contains the provided substring.
      Parameters:
      displayName - substring to search for.
      sort - sort order.
      limit - maximum number of results.
      Returns:
      matching user profiles.

    • disableUser

      @Modifying @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET userEnabled = FALSE WHERE externalId = :externalId") int disableUser(UUID externalId)
      Disables a user profile by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      Returns:
      number of rows updated.

    • enableUser

      @Modifying @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET userEnabled = TRUE WHERE externalId = :externalId") int enableUser(UUID externalId)
      Enables a user profile by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      Returns:
      number of rows updated.

    • setIsManager

      @Modifying @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET isManager = :isManager WHERE externalId = :externalId") int setIsManager(UUID externalId, boolean isManager)
      Sets manager privilege for a user profile by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - user external ID.
      isManager - true to grant manager privileges; false to revoke.
      Returns:
      number of rows updated.
